name: Nano Dimension Ltd.
business: Nano Dimension provides industrial manufacturing solutions combining hardware, software, and materials science. Its products include additive manufacturing systems, surface-mount technology equipment, and industrial inkjet printing systems. Customers include aerospace, defense, automotive, electronics, medical, research, academia, and government organizations.

exposures.sentence: The solutions include industrial machinery, such as those for additive manufacturing, surface-mount technology, industrial inkjet printing, along with software for design, simulation, and manufacturing management, as well as materials or consumables that are used by the machinery.
Utilizing our cloud-based processing, machine learning, and intelligent systems to deliver precise and scalable parts production across facilities.
These solutions are used by industrial customers in aerospace & defense, automotive, electronics, medical, research and academia, along with government organizations.

We are subject to particular risks in light of our two Interim National Security Agreements with the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS). ... include several requirements related to supply assurance, product integrity, protection of personal and technical information, and cybersecurity audits.

catalysts.event: Initiated comprehensive strategic alternatives review process
catalysts.sentence: On September 9, 2025, we announced that we have initiated a process to explore and evaluate a comprehensive range of strategic alternatives to reinforce our commitment to maximize shareholder value while continuing to build relationships with critical customers and market segments.

catalysts.event: Transition to U.S. domestic issuer status
catalysts.sentence: we no longer qualify as a foreign private issuer and have transitioned to a U.S. domestic issuer as of January 1, 2026.
